task_intent.desiredOutcome: Evaluate existing Codex development assets and prove a bounded execution evidence chain.
acceptanceCriteria: Discover no more than three source-bound candidates.
Reject one candidate at a static hard gate.
Complete an approved Audition and a Codex-native turn.
Persist artifact, report, and acceptance evidence through the Event Journal.
constraints: Use injected transport in deterministic mode.
Do not claim an actual model without observed runtime evidence.
assumptions: The fixed Phase 2 fixture clock and transport evidence are authoritative only for deterministic review.

capability_need.description: Reuse a source-bound Codex development asset before building from scratch.
capability_need.verification_method: source audit, Audition, Codex turn, and journal replay
